title: 第2節　花びらのトンネル
chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same blossom-tunnel incident as scene-002-001-002-sera.
Keep the same curving riverside path and same overhead blossoms in both images.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第1話　朝のリズムが整う. Scene focus: 第2節　花びらのトンネル / サトーパート. Summary: ベンチを過ぎた先で、遊歩道はゆるく内側へ曲がっていた。そこだけ桜の枝ぶりがよく、道の上へ淡い屋根のようにかかっている。風が入るたびに花びらが斜めへ流れ、視界の端まで薄く曇る。サ… Key beats: ベンチを過ぎた先で、遊歩道はゆるく内側へ曲がっていた。そこだけ桜の枝ぶりがよく、道の上へ淡い屋根のようにかかっている。風が入るたびに花びらが斜めへ流れ、視界の端まで薄く曇る。サトーはその中をくぐりながら、花見というのは歩いて眺めるより、こうして通り抜けるほうが好きかもしれないと思った。 身体はもう十分に温まり、ジャケットは腰へ軽く巻き直していた。長袖トップス一枚でも寒くない。シューズの着地が軽く、脚が舗装に吸いつきすぎない。自分の身体がきちんと朝へ馴染んでいく感覚は、それだけでちょっとした満足になる。 先に見える緩いカーブの向こうでは、対岸のマンションが桜越しに少しだけぼやけていた。都内の景色なのに、枝の下へ入ると急に余計な情報が減る。サトーは呼吸を整えたまま、その桃色のトンネルを自然に抜けていった。 カーブの脇には細いコーンがひとつ芝生側へずれていて、前を走っていたランナーが靴ひもでも結び直すようにかがみ込んでいた。花びらの多い時期は足元も落ち着かないのだろう。サトーは自分も路肩へ寄りすぎないよう、走路の真ん中を選んだ。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-part of the same blossom-tunnel incident as scene-002-001-002-sera. Keep the same curving riverside path and same overhead blossoms in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Show Sato dominant running through a tunnel-like curve of drifting cherry blossoms, body warmed up and stride light, with a clear sense that running itself has become fun. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato among shadows or background runners, distant but readable, never companion-like.
